title: project A
subtitle: project A subtitle
overview: This project is a dedicated landing page for the Instagram community @somethinglostonroad, which collects humorous photos of lost things submitted by everyone. I developed a dynamic gallery that synchronizes directly with Google Drive API providing a seamless bridge between user submissions and web presentation.

achievements.Cloud-Driven Content Pipeline: Integrated the Google Drive API to fetch and render images dynamically. By using the cloud that I enabled instant content updates without the need for code rebuild or manual asset management within the repository.

achievements.Optimized Asset Delivery: Implemented automated fetching logic to ensure the page remains synchronized with the latest community submissions, significantly reducing the operational overhead for site maintenance.

impact.Zero-Code Maintenance: Successfully eliminated the need for technical intervention during content updates, allowing the community curator to manage the gallery by simply uploading files to a folder.

impact.Streamlined Workflow: Reduced the time-to-publish for new content from a manual development task to a near-instant cloud sync process.
